overall.description: Star Wars game footage showing third-person space combat. The camera follows a light freighter through deep space, transitions to a planetary nebula environment, and culminates in a combat encounter with Imperial TIE fighters near an asteroid base installation.

agents.ego_description: piloting a spacecraft in third-person view, steadily following a light freighter through open space

notable_agents.action: light freighter maintaining steady course ahead of the camera

entered.detail: Corellian-style light freighter with blue-gray hull and illuminated engines
small vessel visible as a distant light in the star field
dense scattering of stars against the black void of space

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in deep space with the camera smoothly following a light freighter. The environment is vast and empty, punctuated only by distant stars and a small transport vessel visible far to the left. The freighter maintains a steady course as the camera tracks from behind.

events.description: exiting deep space into planetary orbit with teal nebula clouds and gas giant becoming visible

agents.ego_description: continuing pursuit of the freighter as it approaches a large gas giant with swirling teal atmosphere

notable_agents.action: freighter moving away toward the planet's upper atmosphere

entered.detail: massive teal and blue gas giant with swirling cloud patterns
teal-colored gaseous clouds filling the lower portion of the frame

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions from empty space to a planetary approach. A massive teal gas giant dominates the right side of the frame while nebula clouds drift across the bottom. The freighter recedes into the distance as the camera follows, maintaining formation while the background shifts from star field to planetary atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: asteroid base perimeter with enemy patrols

events.description: approaching a large asteroid base installation with Imperial TIE fighters emerging from the structure
camera shifts focus from the freighter to pursue a TIE fighter as combat begins

agents.ego_description: engaging enemy fighters, maneuvering aggressively to track TIE fighters near the asteroid installation and through planetary orbit

notable_agents.action: TIE fighter emerging from the asteroid base and banking right
second TIE fighter maneuvering past the camera toward the freighter

entered.detail: massive rocky installation with embedded spires, towers, and glowing teal energy signatures
Imperial TIE fighter with hexagonal solar array panels
second TIE fighter entering the combat zone from the base

segments.scene_description: The final segment introduces a large asteroid base on the left as two Imperial TIE fighters emerge and engage. The camera shifts from escorting the freighter to active combat, pursuing the enemy fighters as they maneuver through space. The gas giant remains visible in the background while the TIE fighters dominate the foreground, with one eventually becoming the primary tracking target as it flies toward the planet.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the void of deep space that gradually transforms into a chaotic combat zone near a planetary nebula. It begins by smoothly tracking a light freighter through a vast, empty starfield where only a distant transport vessel is visible. As the freighter maintains its course, the environment shifts toward a planetary approach, with a massive teal gas giant dominating the frame and nebula clouds drifting across the view. The scene then expands to reveal a large asteroid base on the left, where the camera transitions from escorting the freighter to pursuing two emerging Imperial TIE fighters. Finally, the focus shifts to active combat as the camera tracks a single fighter maneuvering through space toward the distant planet.
